work_unit: SZ-SP-L-003: DetectionInfoPanel array index as key → stable region key
situation: Derived fix from audit-2026-07-07-047 finding SZ-SP-L-003. DetectionInfoPanel renders debugInfo.regions with key={i} (array index). When regions reorder between detection runs, React reconciles by position not identity — causing stale DOM state and potential visual glitches.
action: Replace key={i} with composite key from region label+coordinates (toFixed(4) for float stability). Uses case-104 direct-edit channel on existing opt-sidepanel-1782907225 worktree (cp-guard divergence from prior SZ-SP-L-001/002 fixes).
outcome_evidence: Committed 14a27d9 on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225, pushed to origin. Diff: key={i} → key={`${r.label||'商品'}-${r.x.toFixed(4)}-${r.y.toFixed(4)}-${r.width.toFixed(4)}-${r.height.toFixed(4)}`}
